en.name: Police Escape
en.desc: Play Police Escape free online — move node by node through 183 reconstructed chase puzzles with keys, portals, springs, spikes, shields, and bridges.
en.description: Police Escape is a turn-based chase puzzle rebuilt from the original game's extracted level configurations. Move Viktor one connected node at a time while police respond along the shortest available route. Collect every key, exploit portals and devices, and reach an open exit before the pursuit closes in. The game includes all 183 reconstructed node layouts and supports touch or mouse play.
en.objectives: Reach an open exit before the police catch you. Collect every required key and use each level's devices to create a safe route.
en.howToPlay: Select one of the glowing connected nodes to move. After every move, each active police advances one node along its shortest route toward you.

rules.controls: Tap or click a glowing connected node. Use Reset to restart the current case.
mechanics: Viktor and police move one graph node per turn
Police use BFS shortest-path AI to chase you
Only directly connected nodes can be selected
features: Keys, portals, ice, springs, spikes, bridges, shields, and dual exits

tips: Count graph edges — every extra move gives police another step
Use branches and portals to force police onto slower routes
Collect shields before attempting a risky crossing
Watch spike timing and which dual exit is currently open
Sleeping police wake when the chase gets close or keys are collected

faq.question: How do police move?
faq.answer: Each active police computes the shortest path to your current node and advances one connected node after your move.

faq.question: Why did I lose when our paths didn't overlap?
faq.answer: If the thief and a police trade cells in the same turn (thief moves into police's old spot while police moves into thief's old spot), that counts as a capture.

faq.question: Are the levels solvable?
faq.answer: The game loads all 183 extracted layouts. Advanced device behavior is reconstructed from the available configuration schema and can be refined as more original method logic is recovered.

faq.question: Does my progress save?
faq.answer: Yes, progress (unlocked levels and best step counts) is saved to your browser's localStorage. Clearing browser data resets it.

faq.question: Can I replay earlier levels?
faq.answer: Yes. The level-select screen shows every unlocked level with your best step count, so you can revisit and improve.

faq.question: Is it free?
faq.answer: Yes — play Police Escape free online at ruleword.com. No download, no signup, no ads.

zh.name: 警察与小偷
zh.desc: 免费在线玩《警察与小偷》——在 183 个逆向重建的节点关卡中逐步逃脱，包含钥匙、传送门、弹簧、尖刺、护盾和桥梁。
zh.description: 《警察与小偷》是一款根据原游戏提取关卡配置重建的回合制追逐解谜游戏。每次选择一个相连节点移动 Viktor，警察随后沿最短路线追近一步。收集全部钥匙，利用传送门和机关改变路线，在追捕合围前抵达开放出口。游戏已接入全部 183 个节点布局，支持鼠标和触屏操作。
zh.objectives: 在被警察抓住前抵达开放出口。收集所有钥匙，并利用关卡机关创造安全路线。
zh.howToPlay: 点击发光的相邻节点移动。你每走一步，所有已苏醒警察都会沿最短路线追一步。

rules.controls: 用鼠标或手指点击发光的相邻节点。点击重置可重新开始当前关卡。
mechanics: Viktor 和警察每回合各移动一个图节点
警察使用 BFS 最短路径 AI 追你
只能选择与当前位置直接相连的节点
到达出口前必须收集所有钥匙
features: 183 个原作逆向重建关卡布局
钥匙、传送门、冰面、弹簧、尖刺、桥、护盾和双出口

tips: 计算节点距离——每多走一步，警察也会更近一步
利用分叉和传送门迫使警察绕远
在高风险交汇前优先取得护盾
观察尖刺节奏和双出口当前开放状态
沉睡警察会在追逐靠近或收集钥匙后苏醒

faq.question: 警察怎么移动？
faq.answer: 每个已苏醒警察都会计算到达你当前节点的最短路径，并在你移动后沿连接线前进一步。

faq.question: 为什么路径没重叠也算输？
faq.answer: 如果小偷和警察在同一回合交换位置（小偷走到警察的旧位置，警察走到小偷的旧位置），也算被抓。

faq.question: 关卡都是可解的吗？
faq.answer: 游戏已载入全部 183 个提取布局。高级机关行为依据现有配置 Schema 重建，后续拿到更多原方法逻辑后可以继续精确校准。

faq.question: 进度会保存吗？
faq.answer: 会。进度（已解锁关卡和最佳步数）保存在浏览器 localStorage 中。清除浏览器数据会重置。

faq.question: 可以重玩之前的关卡吗？
faq.answer: 可以。关卡选择界面显示每个已解锁关卡和你的最佳步数，可以随时回放挑战。

faq.question: 免费吗？
faq.answer: 免费——在 ruleword.com 免费在线玩《警察与小偷》。无需下载、无需注册、无广告。
